# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.114.0/http/mod.ts";
import { URLSearchParams } from "https://deno.land/std@0.114.0/encoding/url_search_params.ts";

const config = {
  modulePaths: Deno.env.get("MODULE_PATHS") || new URLSearchParams(Deno.queryParameters).get("module_paths"),
};

if (!config.modulePaths) {
  throw new Error("No module paths provided");
}

async function loadModule(modulePath: string): Promise<void> {
  try {
    const module = await import(modulePath);
    // Add your logic to handle the loaded module here
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Error loading module ${modulePath}:`, error);
  }
}

const handlers: { [key: string]: () => void } = {};

config.modulePaths.split(",").forEach((modulePath) => {
  loadModule(modulePath).then(() => {
    // Add your logic to handle the loaded module here
  });
});

async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(request.url);
  if (url.pathname === "/") {
    return new Response("Welcome to our plugin system!");
  }

  try {
    const modulePath = config.modulePaths.split(",").find((path) => path.includes(url.pathname));
    if (!modulePath) {
      throw new Error(`No handler found for ${url.pathname}`);
    }
    const module = await import(modulePath);
    return handlers[url.pathname] ? handlers[url.pathname]() : new Response("Handler not found");
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
    return new Response("Error handling request", { status: 500 });
  }
}

serve(handler, { port: 8080 });
